title: SQL Mission 9: Top Customer Per Region

initialState.content:
-- Mission 9 Guidelines
-- Build spend per customer and region
-- Rank spend descending within each region
-- Return only top ranked row per region

WITH spend AS (
  SELECT
    c.region,
    c.name,
    SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend,
    -- TODO ranking
  FROM customers c
  INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
  INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
  INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY c.region, c.name
)
SELECT
  region,
  name,
  total_spend
FROM spend
WHERE
  -- TODO
ORDER BY region;

rules: must_include:row_number() over (partition by c.region order by sum(oi.quantity * p.price) desc) as rn
